description: Core capability for the main player window: the default Tauri core permissions (events, window state, app metadata), process exit for the first-run EULA gate's 'Decline & Quit', the open-file dialog so the user can pick media, and the window controls the custom title bar needs (the window is borderless, so minimise/maximise/close/drag are ours to implement). Nothing more — broader permissions are added per feature, never wholesale.
